articles.title: Apple Memorial Day deals are here
articles.summary: Apple is having sales now. Get discounts on MacBooks and AirPods. iPads are also on sale.
articles.impact: Save money on Apple products this weekend.

articles.title: New AMD graphics card coming soon?
articles.summary: An AMD graphics card was seen. It is the RX 9070 GRE. It might go on sale everywhere soon.
articles.impact: A new AMD graphics card could be available globally.

articles.title: Sony's wearable AC is here
articles.summary: Sony has a new tiny AC. It is called Reon Pocket Pro Plus. It will keep you cool in summer.
articles.impact: Sony's new device helps you beat the summer heat.

articles.title: James Bond game footage leaks
articles.summary: A new James Bond game is coming. Some parts of the game leaked online. The game maker showed official footage too.
articles.impact: New James Bond game details emerge after leaks.

articles.title: Xreal thinks smart glasses are ready
articles.summary: Xreal makes smart glasses. They partner with Google. The company thinks the tech is now good enough.
articles.impact: Smart glasses technology may finally be ready for prime time.

articles.title: Google Pixel 11 'Glow' feature maybe not real
articles.summary: People thought they saw Pixel 11's new feature. It was shown at a Google event. It might not be real.
articles.impact: A rumored Pixel 11 feature might be a misunderstanding.

articles.title: AirPods controls could get easier
articles.summary: Apple wants to improve AirPods. Controls might be less confusing. This change is not through an app.
articles.impact: AirPods might become easier to control soon.

articles.title: Luxury car comparison: V6 vs V8
articles.summary: Two fast cars are for sale. One has a V6 engine, the other a V8. The V8 is much more expensive.
articles.impact: Choosing between a powerful V8 and a more affordable V6 car.
